name: Pasta e' Fagioli
recipeIngredient: 30 ounces Can of red kidney beans
Elbow macaroni noodles (as much as desired)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large 10-quart pot, sauté the beef in oil until it starts to brown.
2. Add chopped onion, carrots, celery, and diced tomatoes; simmer for about 10 minutes.
3. Drain and rinse the kidney beans, then add them to the pot along with the beef stock, oregano, black pepper, Tabasco sauce, spaghetti sauce, and cooked macaroni noodles.
4. Simmer until the celery and carrots are tender, approximately 45 minutes.
5. (Makes 9 quarts of soup) Note that it may take a bit longer to cook and be prepared to feed a large group or party. Everyone will enjoy this soup!
